# Copilot Instructions

## Markdown editing

When creating or editing Markdown documents in this repository:

- preserve blank lines before bulleted and numbered lists
- preserve blank lines after lists before returning to paragraph text
- preserve blank lines around headings and horizontal rules
- prefer stable Markdown formatting that renders correctly across GitHub and common Markdown processors
- do not collapse list formatting into preceding paragraphs

## Blog draft guidance

For files in `drafts/`:

- prefer concise, concrete prose
- keep paragraphs relatively short
- use lists when they improve scanability
- favor practical examples over abstract claims
- preserve the author's intent and tone unless asked to rewrite

## Markdown style preferences

When editing Markdown in this repository:

- prefer `-` for unordered bullet lists
- use ATX headings (`#`, `##`, `###`) rather than setext headings
- keep emphasis minimal and use bold primarily for short labels or emphasis that improves scanability
- avoid excessive line wrapping that makes raw Markdown harder to edit
- preserve existing wrapping style within a file unless asked to normalize it
